description: Small pinned GeoJSON datasets used to validate the geo import lifecycle and deterministic Phase 7 tuning probes before large OSM/Geofabrik imports are introduced.

sources.name: phase7-tuning-fixture-land
sources.license: Repository fixture; production land baseline is expected to use OSM-derived OSMData land polygons.

sources.name: phase7-tuning-fixture-navigable-water
sources.license: Repository fixture; production inland water is expected to use OSM/Geofabrik-derived data plus manual overrides.
